info.title: Deeper Router Local API (reverse-engineered)
info.description: Curated from frontend bundle analysis, dynamic-path review, and authenticated probes at runtime.

x-notes: Used by the remote SSH support flow to generate a support connection code.
Frontend downloads support logs as an arraybuffer and saves them as a .dl file.
Stores the device UI language, not just a browser-local preference.
Stores the device UI language, not just a browser-local preference.
password must be RSA encrypted (frontend uses crypto.publicEncrypt + OAEP, base64)
Used by the remote WEB support flow; UI warns users to share the code only with support and include the login password.
Starts a single-session remote WEB support code flow.
Stops an active remote WEB support session.
requires auth cookie; returns success or wallet flags

parameters.name: open
parameters.description: When set to true, frontend uses the expanded notification fetch path variant.

x-notes: Frontend also calls this endpoint as /api/notifications?open=true on initial load.
Response data is grouped under DP and MP notification buckets.
Adds a custom DNS/HTTPS blacklist rule.
Adds a custom DNS/HTTPS whitelist rule.
Clears the custom blacklist after a password-confirmed action.
Clears the custom whitelist after a password-confirmed action.
Deletes selected custom DNS/HTTPS blacklist rules.
Deletes selected custom DNS/HTTPS whitelist rules.
Downloads exported blacklist data.
Downloads exported whitelist data.
Custom DNS/HTTPS blacklist list endpoint discovered via dynamically composed security paths.
Custom DNS/HTTPS whitelist list endpoint discovered via dynamically composed security paths.
Imports blacklist entries from an uploaded file.
Imports whitelist entries from an uploaded file.
Frontend also downloads /api/sharingSecurity/getList/1000?unmasked=Y as an arraybuffer export variant.
Supports query variant ?unmasked=Y for downloadable plaintext/binary log export.
Advanced sharing-log count query used before paginated retrieval.
Exports the direct-routing domain list.
Exports the direct-routing IP list.
Exports the smart-routing domain list.
Exports the smart-routing IP list.
UI strings describe Regular, Random, Domain-Aware, and Round-Robin node selection modes.
UI strings describe Regular, Random, Domain-Aware, and Round-Robin node selection modes.
HTTPS filtering UI is paired with downloadable root CA installation guidance.
HTTPS filtering UI is paired with downloadable root CA installation guidance.
Downloads the root CA certificate used by HTTPS filtering flows.
